UW-26  WELDING PROCESSES. (a) The welding processes permitted include SMAW, GMAW, GTAW, SAW, and other processes qualified in accordance with QW-200. See also QW-250 for essential variable requirements. (b) Each process shall be qualified by procedure qualification records as required by QW-202. (c) Welders shall be qualified as required by QW-300. Subject to the applicable filler metal group, QW-404 shall govern filler metals. For PWHT requirements, refer to UW-28. Except as permitted by UW-52 for spot examination, completed welds shall be examined per UW-11.
